nodes.label: Rax — Heukuppe via Ottohaus
nodes.description: A day hike up Rax from Vienna. Started at the Preinerwiese trailhead, up to Ottohaus, then the ridge walk to Heukuppe (2007 m) and back down the same way.

nodes.label: First sparring round
nodes.description: Notes from my first real sparring round after a few months of bag work and pad sessions — what went well, what I want to drill next.

nodes.label: Miniature batch — Anycubic Photon Mono 4K
nodes.description: A batch of tabletop miniatures printed on the Photon Mono 4K, tuned for fine detail on faces and weapons.

nodes.label: ReelMate
nodes.description: An AI-driven platform that streamlines creating and distributing short-form video content across major social media platforms. Transforms text content into videos, automates cross-platform scheduling, provides engagement analytics, and includes a Telegram bot for content-approval workflows.

nodes.label: LawSyncr
nodes.description: Led end-to-end full-stack development of a legal-tech MVP, integrating machine learning components.

nodes.label: TradeBot
nodes.description: A crypto trading bot that scrapes real-time trade data from Binance for market analysis and automates execution of custom trading strategies.

nodes.label: Printerra
nodes.description: Diploma thesis (BMSTU): a 3D-printer failure detection system based on computer-vision detection.

nodes.label: DAVU / OCR — document analysis
nodes.description: Document analysis project (TU Wien, June 2024) performing layout analysis of historical documents to improve text extraction accuracy, plus Named Entity Recognition and fine-tuned LLMs to extract metadata from document images.

nodes.label: Cryptex
nodes.description: An NFT platform where users authenticate via MetaMask and store/manage seed phrases as encoded NFTs. Built the backend interfacing with the Polygon blockchain for secure, efficient transactions.

nodes.label: susteam
nodes.description: Full-stack development of an ESG platform generating sustainability reports for the hospitality industry. Architected and developed the platform end-to-end.

nodes.label: Rail4Future
nodes.description: Data science project (TU Wien, 2024) analyzing rail irregularities in collaboration with industrial partners Siemens and ÖBB (Austrian Federal Railways).

nodes.label: GLOSAV
nodes.description: Machine learning project detecting railway routes using object detection/tracking algorithms, focused on robustly tracking obstacles on rail tracks.

nodes.label: AIM Hackathon — greenwashing RAG
nodes.description: A platform built during the AIM Hackathon (hosted by TIMETOACT Group) that uses Retrieval-Augmented Generation to detect greenwashing in corporate ESG (Environmental, Social, Governance) reports. Placed 2nd Place Winner.

nodes.label: Tourism knowledge graph
nodes.description: Tourism Technology Hackathon 2023 project: a data pipeline mapping data from multiple sources into a knowledge graph on tourism subjects, visualized as an interactive map with an accompanying chatbot for analyzing points of interest. Placed 2nd Place Winner.

nodes.label: Red Cross lip-reading app
nodes.description: A lip-reading web app built (via Coding Austria) for the Austrian Red Cross to aid communication in noisy environments — streams smartphone video into the AV-HuBERT model to read lips and generate text output.
